description: SAC (Services Accounting Code) list — STARTER PLACEHOLDER covering common service categories. NOT a usable full SAC reference and MUST be replaced before production use.
source: PLACEHOLDER — needs authoritative sourcing from CBIC GST service rate schedule
notes: All SAC codes begin with 99 under the Indian GST classification. This file contains a small illustrative set of the most commonly used SAC codes for service businesses. A real release needs the complete SAC list from the CBIC service rate schedule. Until then, Bahi can fall back to the SAC entries embedded in hsn-common for the most common cases.

entries.note: Various construction services have different rates; verify per sub-category
Hotel accommodation varies: 5%, 12%, 18% based on tariff; restaurants 5% without ITC or 18% with ITC
Economy transport at 5%; AC/first-class at 12%; ride-hailing varies
GTA services: 5% without ITC (reverse charge) or 12% with ITC; rail freight different

entries.description: Other professional, technical and business services
Telecommunication, broadcasting and information supply services
Maintenance, repair and installation (except construction) services
Manufacturing services on physical inputs (goods) owned by others (job work)
entries.note: Job work on textiles 5%; most other job work 12% or 18%
